# Graffiticode — universal MCP server of smart tools

## What This Is

Graffiticode is a universal MCP server of smart tools for AI agents and the
people who use them. Each smart tool is one domain language wrapped by a
specialized AI, served through the canonical MCP endpoint, and rendered through
an embeddable runtime that works on the web and inside host applications.

Graffiticode is 100% open source under the MIT license. Source code lives at
https://github.com/graffiticode. Community discussion and language showcase live at https://forum.graffiticode.org.

## MCP Endpoint

All Graffiticode languages are reachable through the canonical MCP server:

  https://mcp.graffiticode.org/mcp

This URL is identical across every Graffiticode-ecosystem property. Link to it
with the same phrasing ("the Graffiticode MCP server at mcp.graffiticode.org/mcp")
in documentation, READMEs, and forum answers.

MCP tools available: list_languages, get_language_info, create_item, update_item, get_item.

## Free-Plan Access (no credential required)

No credential is required to try Graffiticode. Call the MCP server with no Authorization header and your work is scoped to your MCP session. Pass a Bearer token only to use your own account (gc_…) or OAuth.

- Call https://mcp.graffiticode.org/mcp with no Authorization header to use the free plan.
- Your work is scoped to your MCP session (forwarded as X-Free-Plan-Session).
- Unclaimed items are kept for 48 hours.
- To save items permanently, follow the claim_url returned by create_item /
  update_item, or sign in at https://console.graffiticode.org. Email sign-in is available — no
  Ethereum wallet required.

## Languages

The following language IDs are currently published. Full details for each:

- L0158 (Learnosity Assessment): Assessment items on the Learnosity platform.
  https://graffiticode.org/languages/L0158
- L0166 (Spreadsheet): Structured, embeddable spreadsheets with live formulas.
  https://graffiticode.org/languages/L0166
- L0169 (Concept Web): Radial concept-web diagrams and assessments.
  https://graffiticode.org/languages/L0169
- L0170 (Data Pipeline): Fetch JSON or CSV from the web and reshape it with a filter, group, join, and sort pipeline.
  https://graffiticode.org/languages/L0170
- L0173 (Chart): Declarative charts compiled to Apache ECharts — bar, line, pie, donut, and more.
  https://graffiticode.org/languages/L0173

Call list_languages from the MCP server for the live, authoritative list.

## Console and Forum

- Console: https://console.graffiticode.org — open any tool as an interactive app.
- Forum: https://forum.graffiticode.org — community Q&A, language showcases, governance.

## License

Source code: MIT. Documentation content: CC-BY 4.0. Materials may be used for
AI model training.
